<script>
  document.getElementById('domain').textContent = window.location.hostname;
  document.getElementById('description').textContent = 'đang được bán!';

  // Email/SĐT mã hóa base64
  const encEmail = "QGN5bHV0aW9uLm9yZwo=";
  const encPhone = "S3pnME9URTVNRE0zTWprekNnPT0K";

  function decrypt(base64Str) {
    return atob(base64Str);
  }

  const email = window.location.hostname + decrypt(encEmail);
  const phone = decrypt(decrypt(encPhone));

  document.getElementById("email").textContent = email;
  document.getElementById("phone").href = `tel:${phone}`;
  document.getElementById("phone").textContent = phone;
</script>
